Business Development

Go-to-market, partnerships, revenue diversification, and new market entry. Includes competitive mapping, ICP definition, partnership frameworks, and revenue modeling.

Business Strategy

We facilitate strategic planning that produces real clarity — not binders that collect dust. Includes competitive positioning, SWOT, OKR-based goal setting, and 90-day execution roadmaps.

Grant Research & Applications

Federal SBIR/STTR, state economic development, and foundation funding. Full lifecycle from research to submission to reporting requirements.

Process Optimization

Process mapping, root cause analysis, and lean principles. Deliverables include as-is/to-be maps, improvement roadmaps, and implementation support.

Data Flow & Transformation

Data lineage mapping, transformation logic documentation, tool evaluation, and architecture recommendations for cleaner, more actionable data.

Credit & Funding Consulting

Business credit building, SBA programs, CDFIs, revenue-based financing, debt vs. equity evaluation, and investor readiness.

How it works
Our engagement process

Discovery Call

We listen first. Free 30-min consultation to understand your situation.

Assess & Diagnose

Deep dive into your business, data, and goals.

Strategy & Plan

A clear, prioritized roadmap tailored to you.

Execute & Grow

Hands-on support through implementation and beyond.

Who we serve
Built for bold organizations

Startups

Validating models, building credit, and securing early-stage funding before the runway runs out.

Small & Mid-size Businesses

Scaling operations, optimizing processes, and building strategy that actually gets executed.

Nonprofits

Growing impact through grants, org design, and data systems that tell your story compellingly.

Enterprises

Streamlining org structure, activating data, and modernizing portfolio management at scale.

Business Development

Whether entering a new market, building a channel partner program, or restructuring revenue — we define go-to-market strategy, identify the right opportunities, and build a sustainable pipeline. Includes competitive mapping, ICP definition, partnership frameworks, and revenue modeling.

Feasibility Studies

Before investing significant capital or time, get a clear-eyed analysis of whether your idea is viable. We conduct market sizing, competitive research, financial modeling, operational scoping, and risk assessment — delivering a decision-ready report.

Grant Research & Applications

From federal SBIR/STTR programs to state economic development grants and foundation funding — we identify opportunities and craft compelling applications, managing the full lifecycle from research through submission and reporting.

Business Process Optimization

Using process mapping, root cause analysis, and lean principles, we identify bottlenecks across your operations. Deliverables include as-is/to-be process maps, improvement roadmaps, and implementation support so changes actually stick.

Data Flow & Transformation

We document and redesign how data moves through your organization — from source systems to reporting. Includes data lineage mapping, transformation logic, tool evaluation, and architecture recommendations for cleaner, more actionable data.

Digital Portfolio Management

Whether managing a project portfolio, investment portfolio, or product suite — we establish governance frameworks, tracking systems, and communication cadences so stakeholders always have the right view of performance and priorities.

Business Strategy

We facilitate strategic planning that produces real clarity. Includes vision and mission development, competitive positioning, SWOT and strategy canvas work, OKR-based goal setting, and 90-day execution roadmaps.

Business Credit & Funding Consulting

Many businesses leave money on the table by not building credit or understanding their capital stack. We guide you through establishing business credit, evaluating debt vs. equity options, SBA programs, CDFIs, revenue-based financing, and investor readiness.

Org Streamlining & Coaching

From one-on-one executive coaching to full organizational redesign — we help leaders and teams operate at their best. Includes org chart analysis, role clarity, leadership development, meeting cadence optimization, and culture alignment.

Mergers & Acquisitions

We guide businesses through the complexity of M&A — from early-stage target evaluation and due diligence support to deal structuring, negotiation strategy, and readiness assessments. Whether you're buying, selling, or merging, we help you navigate the process with clarity and confidence.

Integration Planning

A deal closing is just the beginning. We build post-merger integration roadmaps that align people, processes, systems, and culture — reducing friction, accelerating value realization, and ensuring both organizations emerge stronger together.

Change Management

Whether driven by M&A, technology adoption, restructuring, or strategic pivots — we design and execute change management programs that bring people along rather than leaving them behind. Includes stakeholder analysis, communication planning, training design, and adoption tracking.

AI Strategy & Business Readiness

AI is reshaping every industry — and most businesses don't know where to start. We help you cut through the noise with a clear-eyed AI readiness assessment, identify where AI can create real value in your operations, and build a practical adoption roadmap. Services include AI readiness assessments, data strategy for AI, workflow automation consulting, tool evaluation and implementation guidance (ChatGPT, Copilot, and more), and change management for AI adoption. No hype — just strategic, grounded guidance tailored to your business.

Not sure which service fits?

Let's talk it through. Initial consultations are complimentary.

I've sat on both sides of the table. I know what it takes to build, and I know what it costs when you don't have the right support.
About
Meet Heather North
Heather North
Founder & CEO
📧 heather@northstarbusinessadvisory.com
📞 303-517-5000
🌐 Wherever there is internet

Heather brings a multidisciplinary background spanning business strategy, operations, data systems, and organizational development. A University of Denver alumna, she has advised entrepreneurs, nonprofits, and growing enterprises across industries — helping them navigate complexity, unlock funding, and build durable operations.

Her work is grounded in practical experience across business development, feasibility analysis, grant writing, process optimization, and business coaching. Heather works remotely with clients everywhere there is internet — believing that geography should never be a barrier to great advisory support.
